_comment: bitfrog v4 skeleton hooks — 5 条骨架层 hooks(升级时保留不动)

hooks.command:
FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"
if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key|secret|credentials)$'; then
  echo '[BLOCKED] 敏感文件禁止 AI 修改' >&2
  echo '原因: 防止泄露密钥和凭证' >&2
  echo '修复: 手动编辑该文件' >&2
  exit 1
fi

PreToolUse._name: Hook 2: git commit 前 verify(项目 verify 命令填入)

hooks.command: cd {项目绝对路径} && {verify 命令} 2>&1

PreToolUse._name: Hook 3: git commit 前 review 通过检查

hooks.command:
SESSION='.claude/state/session.md'
if [ ! -f "$SESSION" ]; then exit 0; fi
TASK=$(grep -E '^Current task:' "$SESSION" | head -1 | sed 's/.*: //')
if [ -z "$TASK" ] || [ "$TASK" = '(none)' ]; then exit 0; fi
if ! grep -qE "task ${TASK}.*spec: approved" "$SESSION"; then
  echo '[BLOCKED] 当前 task 的 spec compliance review 未通过' >&2
  echo '原因: 必须先 dispatch reviewer-spec 通过才能 commit' >&2
  echo '修复: 按 rules/review.md 跑 two-stage review' >&2
  exit 1
fi
if ! grep -qE "task ${TASK}.*quality: approved" "$SESSION"; then
  echo '[BLOCKED] 当前 task 的 code quality review 未通过' >&2
  echo '原因: spec 通过后必须 dispatch reviewer-quality' >&2
  exit 1
fi

PreToolUse._name: Hook 4: git worktree add 前 ignore 验证

hooks.command:
CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"
TARGET=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oE 'git worktree add [^ ]+' | awk '{print $4}' | xargs dirname)
if [ -z "$TARGET" ] || [ "$TARGET" = '.' ]; then exit 0; fi
if ! git check-ignore -q "$TARGET" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "[BLOCKED] worktree 目标目录 $TARGET 未被 .gitignore ignore" >&2
  echo '原因: 防止 worktree 内容污染主仓库' >&2
  echo "修复: echo '$TARGET/' >> .gitignore && git add .gitignore && git commit -m 'chore: ignore $TARGET'" >&2
  exit 1
fi

PostToolUse._name: Hook 5: Write .claude/plans/*.md 后 plan 格式自检

hooks.command:
FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"
if ! grep -qE '^\*\*Goal:\*\*' "$FILE"; then
  echo '[WARN] plan 缺少 **Goal:** 段' >&2
  exit 0
fi
if grep -qE '(TBD|TODO|implement later|add appropriate error handling|similar to Task [0-9])' "$FILE"; then
  echo '[BLOCKED] plan 含 No Placeholder 红线违规' >&2
  echo '原因: rules/plan.md 禁止 TBD/TODO/implement later/similar to Task N/add appropriate error handling' >&2
  echo '修复: 把 placeholder 展开成具体内容或删除该 task' >&2
  exit 1
fi
